channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S. Destroys Iranian Boats Amid Regional Tensions
item.description: The U.S. Navy sank six Iranian boats after an incident in the Strait of Hormuz, following attacks by Iran on the UAE and shipping.

item.title: Russia and Ukraine announce ceasefires for WWII anniversary
item.description: Russia announced a ceasefire in Ukraine, effective May 8-9, coinciding with Russia's World War II Victory Day.

item.title: Judge cautions against work on D.C. golf course
item.description: A judge cautioned DOJ lawyers regarding potential actions at a D.C. golf course, warning of serious repercussions.

item.title: Iran Updates: UAE Intercepts Iranian Missiles, Drones
item.description: President Trump stated U.S. forces are assisting ships from uninvolved nations to exit the Strait of Hormuz.
